name_en: Chane1☪️24A Hula Chain Bag | A Half-Moon Design
name_cn:
Chane1☪️24A Hula Chain Bag | A Half-Moon Design
Unique and exquisite design. Wax leather paired with metal tassel chains exudes a luxurious and fashionable feel, radiating different charms. A high-end look is revealed with a casual carry.
Size: 18cm
